String.Name: strVEVProductName
String.En: SAP 3D Visual Enterprise Viewer 9.0 FP01 MP1

String.Name: strVEV
String.En: SAP 3D Visual Enterprise Viewer 9.0 FP01 MP1

String.Name: strVEVOfficeProductPartName
String.En: SAP 3D Visual Enterprise Viewer Office Add-in

String.Name: strVEVTargetFolder
String.En: Please select the target directory for the SAP 3D Visual Enterprise Viewer 9.0 FP01 MP1 files

String.Name: strVEVBaseProductDescription
String.En: WARNING: If you have a previous version of Viewer installed it will be updated.

String.Name: strVEV70Installed
String.En: ERROR: SAP 3D Visual Enterprise Viewer 9.0 can only be upgraded from 7.1.x and 8.0.x. If you have an earlier release then uninstall the older version first and then install 9.0.
